mona_lisa.title: Mona Lisa
mona_lisa.blurb: Amber sfumato light settles over a smoky green river valley behind the world's most guarded smile. Warm golds carry primary signals, valley greens supply cool context, and a midnight silk dark anchors text and gridlines.

last_supper.title: The Last Supper
last_supper.blurb: Faded plaster, walnut shadow, and a last breath of warm terracotta cling to Leonardo's refectory wall. Muted warm tones lead the data story while slate and linen grays recede into structure for restrained, print-safe figures.

birth_of_venus.title: The Birth of Venus
birth_of_venus.blurb: Wind-blown gold falls over a pale seafoam gulf as laurel greens darken the shore of Venus's arrival. Radiant golds head the series order, sea greens hold the cool half, and a foam-light ivory keeps multi-panel layouts airy.

primavera.title: Primavera
primavera.blurb: A scarlet mantle and ripening Medici oranges glow out of a midnight grove carpeted with five hundred flowers. Red and gold lead as warm signals, grove green and Zephyr's gray-blue cool the field, and Flora's cream lights the background.

creation_of_adam.title: The Creation of Adam
creation_of_adam.blurb: Clay-warm bodies and a dusty rose mantle drift through teal heaven, two fingertips apart on Sistine plaster. Ochre and clay mark primary series, sash green and empyrean teal answer them coolly, and plaster cream steadies the page.

school_of_athens.title: The School of Athens
school_of_athens.blurb: Amber robes descend marble steps beneath coffered vaults that open onto a clear Athenian sky. Warm golds flag the leading series, arched blues give measured cool counterpoint, and parchment neutrals carry grids and backgrounds.

sistine_madonna.title: Sistine Madonna
sistine_madonna.blurb: Emerald curtains draw back on papal gold, Madonna red, and clouds dissolving into cherub faces. Warm golds and reds carry primary signals, while curtain greens and the mantle's slate blue give cool structure and support.

venus_of_urbino.title: Venus of Urbino
venus_of_urbino.blurb: Crimson daybed and Titian-gold hair burn against dark velvet and a slate-blue dusk at the window. Saturated warm reds and golds flag primary data, while the twilight blues recede into context and secondary structure.

bacchus_and_ariadne.title: Bacchus and Ariadne
bacchus_and_ariadne.blurb: Titian's lavish ultramarine sky crashes into sun-bronzed revelers, cheetah gold, and the wine-dark grove of Naxos. Warm russets lead the eye as primary series, while layered blues from lapis to cloud set cool context.

arnolfini_portrait.title: The Arnolfini Portrait
arnolfini_portrait.blurb: A viridian bridal gown, madder-red canopy, and brass chandelier glow inside van Eyck's amber-lit chamber. Reds and plums mark primary emphasis, while the gown's greens and a teal sleeve carry cool secondary structure.

garden_of_earthly_delights.title: The Garden of Earthly Delights
garden_of_earthly_delights.blurb: Acid-green meadows and alchemical teal pools teem with pale revelers beneath Eden's ochre hills. Golds and russets serve as warm primary channels, with chartreuse and olive greens supplying cool categorical contrast.

hunters_in_the_snow.title: The Hunters in the Snow
hunters_in_the_snow.blurb: Weary hunters and crow-black trees trudge across cream snow toward a frozen green-glass sky. Earthy embers and thatch golds carry the warm primary series, while pond and sky greens hold the cold contextual ground.

tower_of_babel.title: The Tower of Babel
tower_of_babel.blurb: Rust-red brick ramps spiral over golden Flemish stonework while a teal harbor stretches beyond the unfinished tower. Warm masonry tones flag primary series; sea greens and field darks supply cool structure for multi-panel figures.

the_ambassadors.title: The Ambassadors
the_ambassadors.blurb: Gold instruments and pink-crimson satin glow against the deep green damask behind Holbein's two envoys. The gilded warm pair drives primary emphasis while curtain greens and scholarly darks structure secondary panels and gridlines.

young_hare.title: Young Hare
young_hare.blurb: Every watercolor hair of the crouching hare, from russet ear to buff belly, rests on warm blank vellum. Soft browns grade the primary series and grays hold supporting roles, giving muted figures quiet, print-safe contrast.

vertumnus.title: Vertumnus
vertumnus.blurb: Rudolf II blooms out of the dark as apples, wheat, gourds, and roses composed into an emperor's face. Ripe reds and golds head the categorical order while leafy greens and vegetable darks fill secondary and structural roles.

view_of_toledo.title: View of Toledo
view_of_toledo.museum: Metropolitan Museum of Art, New York
view_of_toledo.blurb: Storm light whips across Toledo, flashing acid greens and steel teals beneath a bruised thunderhead sky. Lit hillside hues carry the leading series while slate and rampart darks give cool structure to dense multi-panel layouts.

las_meninas.title: Las Meninas
las_meninas.blurb: Amber palace light falls through velvet gloom onto the Infanta's ivory gown, with one flash of Santiago red at the painter's chest. Glowing warm browns lead the data hierarchy while deep studio shadows anchor text, lines, and background structure.

calling_of_saint_matthew.title: The Calling of Saint Matthew
calling_of_saint_matthew.blurb: A blade of golden light cuts the tavern gloom, striking ochre sleeves, scattered coins, and rust-red velvet amid deep brown shadow. Radiant golds carry primary signals and emphasis; earthen darks and olive supports structure axes, labels, and background.

night_watch.title: The Night Watch
night_watch.blurb: Torch-gold uniforms and a crimson sash surge out of Rembrandt's cavernous brown night. Gold and rust lead the headline series, layered umbers and buff leather supply context, and a parchment-pale ground keeps multi-panel figures luminous.

girl_with_a_pearl_earring.title: Girl with a Pearl Earring
girl_with_a_pearl_earring.blurb: A lapis turban and glowing ochre jacket turn toward the light, crowned by a single drop of pearl against the void. Warm golds flag primary results, the twin blues answer as cool secondaries, and pearl gray softens gridlines over an ivory field.

the_milkmaid.title: The Milkmaid
the_milkmaid.blurb: Lead-tin yellow bodice, ultramarine apron, and a quiet ribbon of milk poured in cool morning light. Warm bread-and-gold hues head the categorical series, apron blue provides contrast, and plaster neutrals keep panels calm and legible.

the_blue_boy.title: The Blue Boy
the_blue_boy.blurb: Shimmering steel-blue satin stands against a russet moor and a brooding silver sky. Satin blues and earthy warms divide the categorical load, the black plume grounds text and lines, and pale lace recedes softly into the background.

the_swing.title: The Swing
the_swing.blurb: A froth of petticoat pink sails through sage shadows and misty garden light, watched from the secret thicket below. The rosy warm pair spotlights primary data, layered greens build context and structure, and blossom cream backs every panel.

napoleon_crossing_the_alps.title: Napoleon Crossing the Alps
napoleon_crossing_the_alps.blurb: A windswept golden cloak blazes over storm-gray granite while the young general, cobalt-clad on a rearing charger, points toward the pass. Gold and bronze lead the data hierarchy; uniform blue, olive, and stone neutrals carry context and background.

oath_of_the_horatii.title: Oath of the Horatii
oath_of_the_horatii.blurb: Terracotta cloaks and outstretched swords catch a single shaft of light inside a shadowed Roman arcade. The reds command primary emphasis while steel, umber, and travertine neutrals frame secondary series, grids, and backgrounds.

grande_odalisque.title: Grande Odalisque
grande_odalisque.blurb: Cool damask blues and a mustard silk drape wrap the odalisque's pearl-lit skin in Ingres's languid harem light. Golds flag primary signals, blues give balanced categorical contrast, and linen neutrals recede into backgrounds.

liberty_leading_the_people.title: Liberty Leading the People
liberty_leading_the_people.blurb: The tricolor snaps above the barricade, flag red and sky blue cutting through powder smoke and rubble browns. Revolutionary red marks primary emphasis; blues and smoke neutrals order secondary series, structure, and light.

raft_of_the_medusa.title: The Raft of the Medusa
raft_of_the_medusa.blurb: Bruised sea-greens, storm-blackened timber, and the pallor of castaway flesh strain toward a thin light on the horizon. Muted warm tones carry the main signals while brine slates and canvas grays supply low-key context for dense figures.

third_of_may_1808.title: The Third of May 1808
third_of_may_1808.blurb: A lantern's cream glare rips the Madrid night, lighting the martyr's shirt, ochre earth, and blood pooled at the firing line. Warm ochres drive primary emphasis; gray, olive, and night black set the somber ground for multi-panel figures.

the_parasol.title: The Parasol
the_parasol.blurb: A maja's golden skirt and jade parasol glow beneath a clear Madrid sky in Goya's sunlit tapestry cartoon. Rich golds lead the categorical series, foliage greens and sky blue cool the mid-range, and a pale cream ground keeps panels airy.

wanderer_above_the_sea_of_fog.title: Wanderer above the Sea of Fog
wanderer_above_the_sea_of_fog.blurb: Olive crags rise through a silver-lavender sea of fog, all restraint and Romantic distance. Earthy warm tones mark primary data, fog slates and firs carry cool context, and the pale veil sits back as a quiet figure background.

fighting_temeraire.title: The Fighting Temeraire
fighting_temeraire.blurb: A ghostly warship drifts on molten gold water while funnel smoke and a pale moonrise blue close the sky. Sunset golds carry emphasis and primary series; grays, blues, and old-oak browns structure secondary panels, axes, and grids.

rain_steam_and_speed.title: Rain, Steam and Speed
rain_steam_and_speed.blurb: Golden steam and driving rain dissolve Maidenhead's brick viaduct into luminous ochre haze. Warm mist tones head the categorical ramp, a rain-slate teal supplies the lone cool counterweight, and engine-iron darks anchor text and lines.

the_hay_wain.title: The Hay Wain
the_hay_wain.blurb: Constable's Stour idles past meadow gold, elm-shaded greens, and a towering silver-clouded English sky. Warm field hues take the primary series, river and cloud blues give cool balance, and a pale sky wash makes an unobtrusive background.

the_gleaners.title: The Gleaners
the_gleaners.blurb: Three bent figures glean a stubble-gold field beneath a hazy harvest sky, dignity rendered in wheat and loam. Earthen golds encode primary signals, rose and sage add muted contrast, and an indigo-dark hood tone grounds text and outlines.

ophelia.title: Ophelia
ophelia.blurb: Riverbank greens and willow golds close over the pale shimmer of a drowned silk gown, strewn with daisies from Millais's fatal stream. Warm brocade tones carry primary signals while layered greens ground context in dense multi-panel figures.

lady_of_shalott.title: The Lady of Shalott
lady_of_shalott.blurb: Autumn amber and tapestry crimson smolder against the black river as the Lady looses her chain at dusk. The two glowing warm hues lead primary series; muted reeds and boat-timber browns recede into supporting structure and annotation.

flaming_june.title: Flaming June
flaming_june.museum: Museo de Arte de Ponce, Puerto Rico
flaming_june.blurb: One incandescent orange gown pours across sun-warmed marble beneath a molten Mediterranean noon. Blazing warm tones command emphasis and primary data; deep siennas and olive shadows steady secondary layers across figure panels.

the_kiss_hayez.title: The Kiss
the_kiss_hayez.blurb: A powder-blue satin dress catches the light against russet cloak and cold medieval stone. The warm-cool duet separates primary classes at a glance, while ashlar grays and stairwell darks handle grids, text, and quiet context.

whistlers_mother.title: Whistler's Mother
whistlers_mother.blurb: An arrangement in grey and black: widow's dress, muslin cap, and a still studio wall in measured tans and olives. Restrained warm neutrals distinguish primary series without shouting; deep near-blacks anchor text, axes, and gridlines.

carnation_lily_lily_rose.title: Carnation, Lily, Lily, Rose
carnation_lily_lily_rose.blurb: Paper lanterns bloom orange and blush against a garden sinking into mauve and teal twilight. Lantern warmth flags highlights and primary data, while dusk blues and lily greens supply cool contrast for secondary structure.

the_ninth_wave.title: The Ninth Wave
the_ninth_wave.blurb: Storm-broken dawn light floods a heaving emerald sea, gilding foam, wreckage, and hope in amber. Golds lead as primary series, deep sea-greens and umbers ground structure, and a foam cream keeps backgrounds luminous.

barge_haulers_on_the_volga.title: Barge Haulers on the Volga
barge_haulers_on_the_volga.blurb: Sun-bleached sand and a milky Volga sky press down on men the color of tar and worn leather. Warm ochres carry primary emphasis, river teals answer as cool secondaries, and pale shore neutrals recede into clean backgrounds.

morning_in_a_pine_forest.title: Morning in a Pine Forest
morning_in_a_pine_forest.blurb: Gold morning fog sifts through pine crowns onto mossy trunks where bear cubs climb a fallen tree. Muted khakis and forest greens give low-glare categorical contrast, with silvery mist and cream reserved for grids and backgrounds.

breezing_up.title: Breezing Up (A Fair Wind)
breezing_up.blurb: A fair wind heels the catboat over green-teal chop, under warm clouds torn open to turquoise. Rusts and siennas flag the primary series, sea greens supply cool contrast, and sail tans with a peach sky soften supporting panels.

american_gothic.title: American Gothic
american_gothic.blurb: Stern faces in Sunday black stand before straw-gold boards, olive trees, and a glimpse of denim overalls. Harvest golds head the categorical order, sober greens and denim carry structure, and a pale gable mint keeps backgrounds airy.

impression_sunrise.title: Impression, Sunrise
impression_sunrise.blurb: An orange sun burns through Le Havre's blue-green harbor mist, its reflection stitched across still water. The lone warm ember serves as highlight and primary signal, while layered misty greens and slates order context, gridwork, and backgrounds.

woman_with_a_parasol.title: Woman with a Parasol
woman_with_a_parasol.blurb: A breezy hilltop of wind-tossed grass beneath a cloud-swept summer sky, a green parasol tilted against the light. Olive greens lead the data series, sky blues carry context, and a deep silhouette tone anchors text over soft cream.

water_lilies.title: Water Lilies
water_lilies.blurb: Lavender-blue water drifts beneath jade lily pads and faint rose blooms in Monet's pond at Giverny. Cool blues build the axes and context, greens mark living signal, and a blossom-pink accent calls out key points.

japanese_footbridge.title: The Japanese Footbridge
japanese_footbridge.blurb: Monet's blue-green footbridge arcs over a pond thick with sunlit reeds, drifting pads, and white blossoms. Layered greens separate the main series, the bridge's teal adds cool contrast, and dark foliage grounds text and gridlines.

luncheon_of_the_boating_party.title: Luncheon of the Boating Party
luncheon_of_the_boating_party.blurb: Straw-gold boaters, a coral-striped awning, and white linen glow amid riverside greens at Chatou. Warm gold and coral head the primary series, green and navy supply structure, and mauve and russet round out supporting layers.

bal_du_moulin_de_la_galette.title: Bal du moulin de la Galette
bal_du_moulin_de_la_galette.blurb: Gaslit golds and acacia canopies shimmer over a blue-black crowd waltzing through dappled Montmartre light. Lamplight hues drive primary emphasis, deep greens and teal frame the structure, and a dusk-violet support echoes the dance floor.

two_sisters_on_the_terrace.title: Two Sisters (On the Terrace)
two_sisters_on_the_terrace.blurb: A vermilion hat blazes over navy flannel, spring blossoms, and the pale ribbon of the Seine at Chatou. Saturated reds carry emphasis and primary signal, indigo and river blue order the context, and a petal-gray field keeps panels airy.

the_ballet_class.title: The Ballet Class
the_ballet_class.blurb: Gauzy tutus and emerald sashes drift across warm parquet in the sage-green calm of Degas's rehearsal room. Browns and creams lead the primary series; greens and soft grays hold context, with the palest tulle reserved for backgrounds.

paris_street_rainy_day.title: Paris Street; Rainy Day
paris_street_rainy_day.blurb: Zinc rooftops, slate umbrellas, and rain-polished cobbles dissolve into the pearl light of a Paris drizzle. Dusty rose and lamppost green carry the main contrasts; layered gray-blues structure context while limestone cream stays for backgrounds.

boulevard_montmartre_at_night.title: The Boulevard Montmartre at Night
boulevard_montmartre_at_night.blurb: Gaslight gold and shopfront embers streak down a wet indigo boulevard in Pissarro's rainy Paris night. Luminous warm hues flag primary signals against deep blues that hold the nocturnal field, with a pale lamp halo as background.

the_childs_bath.title: The Child's Bath
the_childs_bath.blurb: Striped lilac and navy cottons fold around warm skin, a porcelain basin, and a madder-red carpet in Cassatt's tender bath scene. Earthy warms mark primary data; olive and navy give secondary weight while porcelain white keeps backgrounds quiet.

a_sunday_on_la_grande_jatte.title: A Sunday Afternoon on the Island of La Grande Jatte
a_sunday_on_la_grande_jatte.blurb: Chartreuse lawns, violet shadows, and coral parasols shimmer in Seurat's pointillist Sunday stillness. Sunlit yellow-greens and warm coral head the categorical series; deep greens and violets recede into structure over a muslin-light background.

bathers_at_asnieres.title: Bathers at Asnières
bathers_at_asnieres.blurb: Hazy factory smoke hangs over the pale Seine while sunburnt bathers rest on a sage bank in Seurat's summer torpor. Muted warms and greens lead the data series; river blues and slate supply cool context beneath a straw-cream background.

starry_night.title: The Starry Night
starry_night.museum: Museum of Modern Art, New York
starry_night.blurb: A churning midnight sky of ultramarine and slate, lit by stars of burning gold over a sleeping Provençal village. Golds carry primary signals and highlights, while layered night blues give context, structure, and depth across multi-panel figures.

sunflowers.title: Sunflowers
sunflowers.blurb: Fourteen blooms of chrome yellow against ochre and straw, sunlight painted with sunlight itself. The near-monochrome golds and stem greens read as an ordered sequence, with dark seed umber anchoring text and pale cream as a calm background.

cafe_terrace_at_night.title: Café Terrace at Night
cafe_terrace_at_night.blurb: A gaslit awning pours molten gold across the cobblestones while a cobalt sky blooms with stars overhead. Lamp golds mark primary series and callouts; night blues and shadow greens supply cool structure, contrast, and quiet backgrounds.

irises.title: Irises
irises.museum: J. Paul Getty Museum, Los Angeles
irises.blurb: Cobalt irises surge through sword-green leaves, edged by marigold fire and the rust-red earth of Saint-Rémy. Warm golds and terracotta lead primary emphasis, while iris blues and garden greens organize secondary series on a pale mint ground.

the_bedroom.title: The Bedroom
the_bedroom.blurb: A butter-yellow bed and rush chairs glow against calm blue walls, green shutters, and a scarlet coverlet in Arles. Furniture golds lead the categorical order, wall blues add cool structure, and the red accent flags key callouts.

tahitian_women_on_the_beach.title: Tahitian Women on the Beach
tahitian_women_on_the_beach.blurb: A crimson pareo and shell-pink gown rest on golden sand before a band of lagoon green and an ink-dark Pacific. Warm reds and coppers drive primary contrast, cool greens hold secondary context, and the palest pink recedes as background.

the_card_players.title: The Card Players
the_card_players.blurb: Burnt-orange table, wine-dark claret, and patient tobacco browns from Cézanne's absorbed peasant card game. Warm ochres carry the primary series while deep umbers and a weathered rose supply grounded secondary structure.

mont_sainte_victoire.title: Mont Sainte-Victoire
mont_sainte_victoire.blurb: Ochre fields tessellate beneath the violet-blue mass of Cézanne's mountain and a mistral-scrubbed sky. Gold and khaki lead the categorical set; layered blues and greens give cool structure and an airy background.

the_basket_of_apples.title: The Basket of Apples
the_basket_of_apples.blurb: Tumbling russet and green apples, a dark wine bottle, and sun-warmed biscuits against cool white linen. Golds and reds flag the primary series while olive neutrals and pale celadon recede for balanced panels.

at_the_moulin_rouge.title: At the Moulin Rouge
at_the_moulin_rouge.blurb: Gaslight gold and absinthe green cut through the smoky mahogany hush of Lautrec's nightclub crowd. Warm mustard and copper lead the data hierarchy; emerald and olive provide legible cool counterpoint across panels.

the_sleeping_gypsy.title: The Sleeping Gypsy
the_sleeping_gypsy.museum: Museum of Modern Art, New York
the_sleeping_gypsy.blurb: A tawny lion, a striped robe, and a terracotta jug held still under Rousseau's moonlit teal desert night. Sunbaked warms mark key signals, deep Prussian blues carry context, and a moon-pale field keeps backgrounds open.

the_scream.title: The Scream
the_scream.blurb: Blood-red waves roil above an indigo fjord as a sallow figure grips the bridge rail in Munch's psychic sunset. Searing warms drive emphasis while restored fjord blues supply the cool axis for clean categorical contrast.

the_kiss_klimt.title: The Kiss
the_kiss_klimt.blurb: Molten gold leaf enfolds two lovers kneeling on a cliff of violet and green blossoms. Gilded warm hues carry primary signals and emphasis, while meadow greens and violet hold secondary structure against a soft cream ground.

adele_bloch_bauer.title: Portrait of Adele Bloch-Bauer I
adele_bloch_bauer.blurb: A shimmering wall of gold engulfs Adele, her raven chignon and jeweled indigo tesserae flashing through the gilded haze. Radiant ambers drive primary emphasis; deep indigo and olive anchor secondary categories on a warm porcelain ground.

four_trees.title: Four Trees
four_trees.blurb: Four bare chestnut trees stand in silhouette against banded dusk light, their brick-red crowns dissolving into gray-green hills. Muted rust and tan lead the data series while deep fir and bark tones supply line work over a pale blush sky.

jeanne_hebuterne.title: Jeanne Hébuterne
jeanne_hebuterne.museum: Metropolitan Museum of Art, New York
jeanne_hebuterne.blurb: Jeanne's auburn hair and ochre chair glow against tranquil teal walls and her milk-white slip. Warm ambers take primary series and callouts; cool teal and willow greens give context, with a soft mint field for backgrounds.

senecio.title: Senecio
senecio.blurb: Klee's aging actor gazes out through vermilion eyes, his round face a mosaic of gold, powder pink, and chalk on a burnt-orange ground. Fiery reds and golds lead the hierarchy while plum and russet hold the dark end of the diverging scale.

composition_viii.title: Composition VIII
composition_viii.blurb: Circles, arcs, and beams in signal red, gold, and Bauhaus blue drift across a warm cream field. Saturated primaries mark key measurements, the haloed dark circle anchors extremes, and quiet olive and coral recede as supporting context.

composition_red_blue_yellow.title: Composition II in Red, Blue, and Yellow
composition_red_blue_yellow.blurb: Pure cadmium red, twin primary blues, and one bright yellow square held by a stark black grid on gallery white. Reds drive primary series, blues answer as secondary, and the grid's neutrals supply lines and clean backgrounds.

dance.title: Dance
dance.blurb: Vermilion dancers whirl against a cobalt night sky above the cool sweep of a hill. Warm reds carry the main signals and highlights, deep blues ground secondary series, and a pale mint field keeps multi-panel figures airy.

goldfish.title: Goldfish
goldfish.blurb: Scarlet fish glow in a glass bowl amid emerald leaves and rose-pink blooms. Fish-warm reds and gold flag primary results, layered greens structure secondary data, and pale bowl-water tones recede into the background.

large_blue_horses.title: The Large Blue Horses
large_blue_horses.blurb: Rounded ultramarine horses graze beneath crimson hills and streaks of gold and pink dawn. Vivid warm hues mark primary effects, the horses' blues and lilacs organize context, and soft mist tones frame multi-panel layouts.

great_wave.title: The Great Wave off Kanagawa
great_wave.museum: Metropolitan Museum of Art, New York
great_wave.blurb: Prussian-blue water rears into clawed white foam over tan boats and a paper-cream sky. Deepening indigo blues encode ordered series, warm timber accents call out key points, and foam and rice-paper neutrals stay quietly in support.

red_fuji.title: Fine Wind, Clear Morning
red_fuji.blurb: Fuji's rust-red cone rises into an indigo sky combed with cream mackerel clouds. Warm russet and straw carry primary emphasis, layered morning blues give cool structure, and haze grays keep annotations and backgrounds calm.

kirifuri_waterfall.title: Kirifuri Waterfall at Kurokami Mountain
kirifuri_waterfall.blurb: Threads of Prussian-blue water plunge over sunlit ochre rock, hemmed in by mossy greens on Kurokami's slopes. Warm golds flag primary series, layered greens group related panels, and the indigo dark anchors text against a pale mist-peach ground.

plum_park_in_kameido.title: Plum Park in Kameido
plum_park_in_kameido.museum: One Hundred Famous Views of Edo
plum_park_in_kameido.blurb: A madder-red sky cools to blush above slate plum boughs, white blossoms bursting over the teal garden at Kameido. Warm reds carry the primary signal, deep teal and moss green structure comparisons, and soft creams recede into the background.

sudden_shower_over_shin_ohashi.title: Sudden Shower over Shin-Ōhashi Bridge and Atake
sudden_shower_over_shin_ohashi.museum: One Hundred Famous Views of Edo
sudden_shower_over_shin_ohashi.blurb: An ink-black squall breaks over Shin-Ohashi, rain slanting across straw hats, tan planks, and the blue-green Sumida. The cartouche red serves as emphasis, warm timbers lead data series, and rain-cooled teal and olives supply calm mid-tone contrast.

naruto_whirlpools.title: Awa Province: Naruto Whirlpools
naruto_whirlpools.museum: Views of Famous Places in the Sixty-odd Provinces
naruto_whirlpools.blurb: Prussian swells coil into a spindrift vortex beneath rose-brown crags and a pale dawn horizon at the Naruto strait. Coral and gold warms mark focal series against deep channel blues; sand neutrals and foam whites handle fills and backgrounds.

evening_snow_at_kanbara.title: Evening Snow at Kanbara
evening_snow_at_kanbara.museum: The Fifty-three Stations of the Tokaido
evening_snow_at_kanbara.blurb: Dusk settles in slate blue and hushed cream over Kanbara, thatched roofs and travelers muffled under fresh evening snow. Muted rose and beige lead the categorical series, cool grays give quiet structure, and a single inky dark carries text and axes.

three_beauties.title: Three Beauties of the Present Day
three_beauties.blurb: Powdered faces and lacquer-black coiffures glow on a shimmering mica ground, warmed by gold combs and brick-red silk. Gold and russet lead the series, layered greiges build quiet hierarchy, and the deep hair-black anchors text in muted figures.

beauty_looking_back.title: Beauty Looking Back
beauty_looking_back.blurb: A vermilion kimono blooms with safflower dye against bare tan silk, anchored by lacquer-black hair. Warm reds carry primary signals and emphasis while olive, silk, and blossom neutrals recede into context and backgrounds.

jakuchu_rooster.title: Nandina and Rooster
jakuchu_rooster.blurb: Scarlet nandina berries cascade over an ink-black rooster whose plumage flashes teal against gold-toned silk. Reds flag primary series and callouts; deep teals structure secondary data, with olive and silk neutrals holding supports and backgrounds.

thousand_li_of_rivers_and_mountains.title: A Thousand Li of Rivers and Mountains
thousand_li_of_rivers_and_mountains.blurb: Azurite peaks and malachite slopes roll across a thousand li of golden silk haze. Mineral blues and greens anchor the cool series, warm ochres lead primary channels, and a pale celadon wash stays clear for backgrounds.

along_the_river_qingming.title: Along the River During the Qingming Festival
along_the_river_qingming.blurb: Sepia ink on worn silk records a bustling gate tower, camel trains, and bare willows along the Bian River. Graded browns rank series by depth in near-monochrome figures, while a vermilion seal red stands ready as the lone deliberate accent.

dwelling_in_the_fuchun_mountains.title: Dwelling in the Fuchun Mountains
dwelling_in_the_fuchun_mountains.blurb: Dry hemp-fiber strokes and charred ink settle onto aged paper along the calm Fuchun River. Ink greens and olives separate structural layers, pale paper tones keep panels airy, and a muted clay red is reserved for sparse emphasis.

nymph_of_the_luo_river.title: Nymph of the Luo River
nymph_of_the_luo_river.blurb: Amber-toned silk bears the Luo goddess across dragon-drawn waves sketched in warm sienna line. Apricot-to-chestnut steps encode ordered depth on one warm axis, while rose and silt supports keep categorical panels legible.

night_revels_of_han_xizai.title: The Night Revels of Han Xizai
night_revels_of_han_xizai.blurb: Cinnabar bedscreens and candlelit silk glow against ink-black gauze hats and olive scholar robes in Gu Hongzhong's nocturnal banquet. Warm reds and browns carry primary signals; dark olives and pale silk neutrals set structure and background.

five_oxen.title: Five Oxen
five_oxen.blurb: Tawny gold, russet, and deep umber hides amble across bare hemp paper flecked with crimson collector seals. The two brightest coats lead primary data; darker earths hold contrast roles while the pale paper tone serves as background.

bunian_tu.title: Emperor Taizong Receiving the Tibetan Envoy
bunian_tu.blurb: Blazing vermilion robes, ceremonial fans, and crimson seals press against warm amber silk as Taizong receives the Tibetan envoy. Saturated reds flag key findings; brocade ambers, celadon fans, and peach silk carry context, supports, and background.

court_ladies_preparing_silk.title: Court Ladies Preparing Newly Woven Silk
court_ladies_preparing_silk.blurb: Gilded silk ground, apricot shawls, a jade-green mat, and slate-indigo gowns surround court ladies pounding newly woven silk. Warm golds head the categorical run; jade and indigo add cool contrast while charcoal and ivory anchor text and background.

court_ladies_adorning_with_flowers.title: Court Ladies Adorning Their Hair with Flowers
court_ladies_adorning_with_flowers.blurb: Scarlet skirts under sheer amber gauze, towering raven chignons crowned with peonies, a crane and a lapdog on warm umber silk. Reds and golds carry primary emphasis; deep browns, olive, and powdered creams supply darks, supports, and background.

one_hundred_horses.title: One Hundred Horses
one_hundred_horses.blurb: Palomino gold, bay brown, and dapple gray coats graze along pine banks and misted blue peaks in Castiglione's silk panorama. Muted warm hides distinguish primary categories; green and slate cools give gentle contrast against a pale silk haze background.
